headline: 当前本地现场证据显示至少 12 笔可见样本，用户估计约 41 笔，最终进度待完整本地历史导出核验。
current_answer_policy: Do not report 0 or 11 as the current local sample count. Report at least 12 visible, about 41 pending reconciliation, and wait for full local export for final M6.1 progress.
